reason: Allowlisted 2026-06-22: POST /dental/visits/{visitId}/amendments/{amendmentId}/approve is a 501 NOT_IMPLEMENTED stub — supervisor approval is deferred behind the dental_clinical_amendment_approval flag (BR-019). It mutates nothing and returns 501 to every authenticated caller, so there is no object-ownership/IDOR surface to test. Re-evaluate when the approval workflow ships.

Allowlisted 2026-06-22: POST /dental/public/appointments/{appointmentId}/confirm/{token} is a PUBLIC, unauthenticated endpoint — its trust boundary is the single-use, status-guarded confirmation token (+ IP rate limit), not per-user object ownership. A cross-tenant/IDOR test does not apply; replay is closed by the single-use token clear.

Allowlisted 2026-06-22: DELETE /providers/practitioners/{id} is gated by the admin/credentialing route-role middleware; the deny path (patient -> 403) is covered by provider-br-invariants.test.ts (V-PROV-003). Practitioner records are not org-tenant-scoped (V-PROV-001: a smuggled foreign person id is ignored), so the role gate is the boundary, not object ownership.

Allowlisted 2026-06-22: DELETE /providers/practitioner-roles/{id} shares the admin/credentialing route-role middleware with the practitioner writes (deny path in provider-br-invariants.test.ts V-PROV-003). The provider module is not org-tenant-scoped (V-PROV-001), so the role gate is the boundary, not object ownership.

Allowlisted 2026-06-22: POST /billing/webhooks/stripe is UNAUTHENTICATED — its trust boundary is the Stripe webhook signature (verified, with an idempotency ledger, in handleStripeWebhook.test.ts), not per-user object ownership. A cross-tenant/IDOR negative test does not apply to a signature-gated machine-to-machine endpoint.

Allowlisted 2026-06-22: POST /dental/erasure-requests is platform-admin-only; the non-admin -> 403 deny path for every erasure endpoint is covered by erasure-routes.test.ts (EM-DG-RBAC). Admin RBAC, not per-object ownership, is the boundary.
